description: Synthetic research benchmark: final human scores for 25 generated case reports.
scope: Calibration of fidelity, structure, probative discipline, interpretive drift and uncertainty visibility.

human_review_notes.provenance_note: The 25 scores are the final score list transmitted for benchmark calibration. The detailed review of reports n1–n5 is preserved as a separate earlier qualitative review and is not replaced by this list.
recurring_issues: probative language stronger than source support
insufficient separation between facts, statements, perceptions and hypotheses
human_review_notes.benchmark_boundary: Scores are calibration references, not legal findings or ground truth.
